title: APT Metadata and Versioning Contract
source: Extracted from applied-practical-thinking documentation architecture and versioning material

versioning_rules.patch: Small clarification that does not change required behavior.
versioning_rules.minor: New guidance, example, prompt, checklist, or reference that remains compatible.
versioning_rules.major: Breaking doctrine, contract, validation, or adoption expectation change.

rules: Canonical doctrine changes require versioned files and validation.
Project-specific exceptions belong in local adoption docs or decision records.
Generated public views must point back to their canonical source.
Deprecated guidance must identify its replacement or archive rationale.
required_evidence: Consumer or public-site sync note when applicable
